## What does this change?

<!-- A short description of the change and why it's needed. -->

Closes #

## How was it tested?

<!--
Be specific — "it builds" isn't testing. What did you actually run and observe?
For UI changes, attach a screenshot or a short screen recording of the island.
-->

- [ ] `swift build` succeeds
- [ ] `./scripts/run-tests.sh` passes
- [ ] `./make-app.sh` — exercised the change in the real `.app` bundle

## Checklist

- [ ] The diff is focused on one logical change
- [ ] I read the surrounding code and matched its style
- [ ] Tests added or updated, if this changes covered logic
- [ ] No new third-party dependencies
- [ ] No new outbound network calls — nothing leaves the user's machine
- [ ] Docs (`README.md` / `PROJECT.md`) updated if behavior or data sources changed
